content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Multiplication Table". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/448/problem/D
constraints: The input will always be a positive integer.
content.inputFormat: The input will consist of a single integer n.
content.outputFormat: Print the multiplication table for the given number.

solution.approach: Use nested loops to generate the multiplication table.
